support.title: Veridian Support
support.intro: How can I help you today?
support.plan_expired: The **{plan}** subscription for this server has expired.
support.renewal_info: Please pay before this date to keep it active and avoid deactivation of plan options.
support.expired_info: You must repay to reactivate. Until then, plan options remain disabled.

tickets.welcome_desc: <:stargreen:1490059445240074420> The ticket is ready. Use the buttons below for assignment.
tickets.config_missing_desc: <a:arrowred:1490070068631961861> The bot is not yet configured on this server. Ask an admin to visit the panel: https://veridiancloud.xyz/dashboard
tickets.limit_reached_desc: <a:arrowred:1490070068631961861> You already have {open_count} ticket(s) open. Limit: {max_open}.
tickets.no_category_desc: <a:bluearrow:1490059434804777135> The ticket category is not configured. Visit https://veridiancloud.xyz/dashboard
tickets.invalid_category_desc: <a:bluearrow:1490059434804777135> Ticket category not found or invalid. Please check the panel.
tickets.not_in_ticket: <a:arrowred:1490070068631961861> This command can only be used in ticket channels.
tickets.close_confirm_desc: <:stargreen:1490059445240074420> Close request recorded. A staff/admin must confirm.
tickets.close_success_desc: <a:ticket~1:1490059461388406834> Ticket closed. Summary and transcript sent.
tickets.wait_desc:
<a:Loading:1490059443646500884> You can open a new ticket in **{seconds} seconds**.
<a:arrowred:1490070068631961861> This limit prevents abuse.
tickets.ticket_already_taken: <a:greencrown:1490059438604681368> This ticket is already handled by another staff member.
tickets.auto_close_desc: <a:ticket~1:1490059461388406834> This ticket was closed due to inactivity (> 3 days).
tickets.default_welcome_user: <:stargreen:1490059445240074420> Hello {user_mention}! Describe your issue and we will help you as soon as possible.
tickets.blacklisted_desc: <a:arrowred:1490070068631961861> You are not allowed to open tickets on this server.
tickets.rating_desc: <:stargreen:1490059445240074420> Rate your experience from 1 to 5 stars.
tickets.db_error_desc: <a:arrowred:1490070068631961861> Unable to create ticket. Please try again later.
tickets.channel_closing: <a:Loading:1490059443646500884> This channel will be deleted shortly.

payments.upgrade_instruction:
Upgrade via the panel or with the /pay command.
{dashboard_url}
payments.pro_desc: Unlimited | All languages | Unlimited KB | Staff suggestions | Advanced stats
payments.suggestion:
Veridian AI - Plans & Pricing

**Starter (4€/month)**
- 500 tickets/month
- 20 languages
- Transcriptions

**Pro (12€/month)**
- Unlimited usage
- Staff suggestions
- Advanced analytics

**Business (29€/month)**
- SLA
- Advanced automations
- Premium add-ons

Secure payment via Crypto or manual methods in the dashboard.
payments.admin_required: You must be a server administrator to initiate a payment.
payments.paypal_instructions:
**Steps to pay via PayPal:**

1. Go to **paypal.com** -> Send Money
2. Enter: `{paypal_email}`
3. Amount: **{amount:.2f} EUR**
4. **On mobile**: tap *Add a note*
   **On computer**: click *Add a message*
5. In this field, write **exactly**:
```text
{order_id}
```
6. Send the payment

**WARNING:** Without this reference, we cannot link the payment to your order.

Activation within 24h after verification.
payments.giftcard_desc:
Plan: **{plan}** | Amount: **{amount:.2f} EUR**

You will receive a DM to provide your code and the card image.
payments.giftcard_dm_image: Now send an image of the gift card:
payments.giftcard_dm_success: Thank you! Your order is pending validation (max 24h).
payments.crypto_desc:
Plan: **{plan}** | Amount: **{amount:.2f} EUR**

Click the button below to pay.
The bot will be notified automatically.
payments.crypto_error: Error generating invoice. Please try again.

notifications.payment_confirmed_desc:
Your **{plan}** subscription is now active on **{guild_name}**.
Expiration: **{expiry}**.

Renew before this date to maintain active premium features.
notifications.payment_rejected_desc:
Your order `{order_id}` has been rejected.{reason}
Contact support: {url}
notifications.payment_partial_desc:
The amount received for order `{order_id}` is insufficient.
Please send the remaining balance with the same reference.

dashboard.help_round_robin: When a ticket is opened, it is automatically assigned to the staff member with the fewest active tickets.
dashboard.desc_sla: Notifications for tickets not handled within deadlines
dashboard.help_sla_threshold: Time before alert if ticket not taken
dashboard.desc_satisfaction: Request a rating after ticket closure
dashboard.placeholder_satisfaction: Thank you for rating your experience...
dashboard.help_satisfaction: Message sent with 1-5 star rating buttons
dashboard.desc_anti_spam: Limits tickets per user over a period
